description_long: This is a single-propeller, military-style airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-mounted, straight wing configuration. The exterior is painted in a dark greenish-gray camouflage with prominent red roundels on the wings and fuselage, reminiscent of World War II Japanese aircraft. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned near the front of the fuselage, featuring a clear canopy. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a tailwheel landing gear visible. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tailwheel. The overall design suggests a lightweight, maneuverable aircraft built primarily from metal.
description: A dark green, single-propeller military airplane with red roundels, low-mounted straight wings, and an enclosed forward cockpit. Features a conventional tail and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the propeller, cockpit canopy, red roundels, and tailwheel landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, forward canopy, and the full wingspan with red roundels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the tail and landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the main landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
